message:
feat(tests): add and expand integration test suites across 23 files covering enrichment, RGC contracts, and TS normalization

Add new enrichment integration tests: attestation_handshake,
claim_entitlement, contextual_policy_selector, delegation_chain,
semantic_twin, specialization_rollback_gate (752 lines), trust_card,
performance_statistical_validation (861 lines, RGC-702).

Add new contract/gate tests: frx_compile_vs_fallback, parser_oracle_gate,
parser_operator_developer_runbook, rgc_executable_compatibility_target_matrix,
rgc_execution_profile_contract, ts_normalization_integration.

Expand existing suites: execution_orchestrator_integration,
rgc_cross_platform_matrix, rgc_planning_track_integration,
rgc_security_enforcement_verification_pack, zero_placeholder_scan,
frx_track_e_verification_fuzz.

Add extension-host test asserting guardplane runner script uses
repo-local namespaces. Add parser_operator_developer_runbook fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
